steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The phrase “special province” is the decisive clue. The text explains that Tía Ana used the parlor for her school and now watches it become a salon, requiring daily restoration. This framing introduces her territorial attachment to the space.

steps.title: Match the purpose to the signal
steps.content: Choice D links the reference to her "special province" to the reason for her eagerness: the repurposing disrupts her domain. A, B, and C misinterpret the tone or add unsupported elements like betrayal (C), social escape (B), or honor (A). That matches choice D — D is correct.
